description: Core household entity with basic composition
Social and cultural attributes of households
Time allocation for basic needs collection

DDL:
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CONSUMPTION CASCADE;
CREATE TABLE FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CONSUMPTION (
	CONSUMPTION_ID BIGINT PRIMARY KEY,
	HOUSEHOLD_ID BIGINT,
	GEOGRAPHY_ID BIGINT,
	MONTHLY_CONSUMPTION_PER_CAPITA DOUBLE PRECISION,
	MONTHLY_TOTAL_CONSUMPTION_EXPENDITURE_RS DOUBLE PRECISION,
	MONTHLY_NON_FOOD_EXPENDITURE_RS DOUBLE PRECISION,
	FOREIGN KEY (HOUSEHOLD_ID) REFERENCES DIM_HOUSEHOLD (HOUSEHOLD_ID),
	FOREIGN KEY (GEOGRAPHY_ID) REFERENCES DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY (GEOGRAPHY_ID)
);

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS FACT_FOOD_CONSUMPTION CASCADE;
CREATE TABLE FACT_FOOD_CONSUMPTION (
	FOOD_CONSUMPTION_ID BIGINT PRIMARY KEY,
	HOUSEHOLD_ID BIGINT,
	CONSUMPTION_RICE_EXPENDITURE_RS DOUBLE PRECISION,
	CONSUMPTION_WHEAT_EXPENDITURE_RS DOUBLE PRECISION,
	CONSUMPTION_SUGAR_EXPENDITURE_RS DOUBLE PRECISION,
	CONSUMPTION_PULSES_EXPENDITURE_RS DOUBLE PRECISION,
	CONSUMPTION_MILK_EXPENDITURE_RS DOUBLE PRECISION,
	CONSUMPTION_VEGETABLES_EXPENDITURE_RS DOUBLE PRECISION,
	CONSUMPTION_EDIBLE_OILS_EXPENDITURE_RS DOUBLE PRECISION,
	FOREIGN KEY (HOUSEHOLD_ID) REFERENCES DIM_HOUSEHOLD (HOUSEHOLD_ID)
);
